expectations.text: Validation section explicitly states there are no joins in this pipeline
expectations.evidence: Validation section explicitly states the pipeline has no joins.

expectations.text: Validation checks required columns and PR-grain duplicates
expectations.evidence: Validation checks required columns and duplicate or PR-grain logic.

expectations.text: Validation checks date filter scope and repo filter behavior
expectations.evidence: Validation checks both date scope and repo filter behavior.

expectations.text: Validation includes aggregation-safety or reconciliation checks for distinct PR counts
expectations.evidence: Validation includes reconciliation or aggregation-safety language.

expectations.text: Review notes use PT-BR checkpoint language and explain why dataset research was not triggered
expectations.evidence: Review notes use checkpoint-style confirmation language and explain why dataset research was not triggered.
